case_title: LA JOLLA COVE INVESTORS, INC. VS. KENNETH MILLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: MEMO OF P&A IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (TRANSACTION ID # 100043269) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LA JOLLA COVE INVESTORS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF LA JOLLA COVE INVESTORS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO FORM INTERROGATORIES. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED COMPLETELY TO COMPLY WITH THE DISCOVERY ACT. THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO AWARD MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1860.00. PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 DIRECTLY BY EMAIL TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT JULIA@CAMPINSBENHAMBAKER.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JULIA CAMPINS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-21-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-14-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections, To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LA JOLLA COVE INVESTORS, INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections, To Form Interrogatories.

Plaintiff's Motion is granted. Defendant has failed completely to comply with the Discovery Act. The Court finds good cause to award monetary sanctions in the amount of $1860.00.

Prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly by email to the Judge Pro Tem at julia@campinsbenhambaker.com

Judge Pro Tem: Julia Campins, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Set For Trial On May-28-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
